scaffold.description: Validate the reusable workflow scaffold itself.

default.description: Validate the scaffold repository with the standard workflow surface.

all.description: Run every configured scaffold validation check.

commands.build: GO_CMD="$(command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo go || echo go.exe)"; "$GO_CMD" build ./...
commands.test: GO_CMD="$(command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo go || echo go.exe)"; "$GO_CMD" test ./...
commands.coverage: GO_CMD="$(command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo go || echo go.exe)"; "$GO_CMD" test -coverprofile=.agent/logs/coverage.out ./...

commands.build: if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ] && command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm run build; else npm run build --if-present; fi
commands.lint: if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ] && command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm run lint --if-present; else npm run lint --if-present; fi
commands.test: if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ] && command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm run test --if-present; else npm test --if-present; fi
commands.coverage: if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ] && command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm run coverage --if-present; else npm run coverage --if-present; fi
commands.security: if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ] && command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm audit --audit-level high || true; else npm audit --audit-level=high || true; fi
